compressed_view: V2 screen audit methodology: pre-loaded principle-to-pattern mapping (nav depth to Hick's Law, data entry to Zero-Friction Logging, permission flow to Privacy by Default, first impression to Readiness-First, success states to Celebration Not Guilt). Severity calibration: P0 = token violations + missing analytics + broken a11y, P1 = UX behavior gaps + missing states, P2 = copy + content + deferred. Finding counts diminish across screens (27 to 32 to 23 to 9 to 4) reflecting genuine improvement, not audit degradation. Front-load anti-pattern checks: raw Color literals, missing VoiceOver labels, hardcoded spacing — fastest wins. Always load L2 ux-foundations-map.json before starting any audit to avoid re-deriving principle mappings (saved 1.5h from Home to Nutrition).

task_signature.context: Audit a v1 Swift screen against 13 UX Foundations principles. Produce v2-audit-report.md with P0/P1/P2 severity.

learned_patterns.decision: Pre-loaded mapping of which principles apply to which UI patterns: nav depth → Hick's Law, data entry → Zero-Friction Logging, permission flow → Privacy by Default, first impression → Readiness-First, success states → Celebration Not Guilt.
P0 = token violations + missing analytics + broken a11y. P1 = UX behavior gaps + missing states. P2 = copy + content + deferred.
Later screens have fewer findings (27→32→23→9→4). A lower finding count is genuine improvement from prior screen fixes, not audit degradation. Do not force-inflate finding counts.
Check known violations first: raw Color literals, missing VoiceOver labels, hardcoded spacing. These are the fastest wins and consistently appear across screens.

anti_patterns.what_went_wrong: Home v2 spent ~2h mapping principles from scratch. Nutrition took 30min with cache. Always load the principle-to-pattern mapping from L2 ux-foundations-map.json before starting any audit.

Flagging patterns that were fixed in prior screen refactors wastes time unless they re-appear in the current screen's v1 file. Check git history of prior v2 screens to avoid re-reporting closed findings.

speedup_instructions: Load L2 ux-foundations-map.json for principle mapping. Check anti-pattern library first. Only investigate novel patterns not covered by cache.
